title: Kinetic Study of Silver Catalytic Degradation of Phoxim
author: Shams, Chaichi, et al.

steps.title: Kinetic method
steps.instruction: 0.500 mL phoxim (3.2 mmol l-1) and 0.500 mL of Ag+ (3.2 mmol l-1) were mixed in autosampler vial to obtain Ag+ to phoxim mole ratio of 1:1 and kinetics was followed by HPLC on 0–184 min (with 17 min interval) at 25 °C. To study the kinetic constant at different temperatures, prepared sample was placed in the oven at the desired temperature and 20 microliters of it Immediately, was injected into the HPLC at the desired times. Each experiment was repeated three times.
